doc_title: Pseudonymisation Under the GDPR — EDPB Guidelines 01/2025
label: partial
reason: EDPB Guidelines 01/2025 on Pseudonymisation is a real document adopted 16 January 2025 with substantively accurate content, but the retrieved text is a brief paraphrased summary rather than the actual full guideline.
response_turn1:
The EDPB did indeed adopt Guidelines 01/2025 on Pseudonymisation on 16 January 2025, and the substantive content shown (pseudonymised data remaining personal data, Article 11 carve-out, Article 9 still applying to health data) is consistent with the actual guidelines. However, the retrieved document is a very short summary/extract rather than the full text, so I cannot verify exact wording.
